system.effect: The ritual creates dozens of eldritch tentacles that emerge from a dark seething mass of protoplasm hidden underfoot. The tentacles attack with Melee-0 and STR 12 (+2 to hit total) and do 2d6 damage. Each tentacle has a damage capacity of 18 points. Slashing weapons do full damage, while any blunt weapons or piercing weapons have their damage dice reduced by 1 die. Multiple tentacles can attack a single target, often immobilizing targets before strangling them.
system.critSuccess: The tentacles come with spikes that do an additional die of damage (3d6 total). The tentacles are also more nimble and have Melee-1 skill.
